title: Artifact Frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter on pipeline artifacts in .groundwork/artifacts/. Defines freshness, approval, provenance, and dynamic dependencies.

schema.description: Path to the artifact type's schema, relative to .groundwork/.

produced_by.description: The skill name that produced this artifact.

produced_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime with mandatory timezone offset.

depends_on.description: Dynamic dependencies declared by the producing agent.

approval.description: Human-determined approval axis. Present only when pipeline.toml requires it.

dependency-entry.description: A reference to an artifact this artifact depends on.

artifact.description: Artifact type name or specific artifact filename.
